caption:
OpenAI has teamed up with Broadcom to unveil the 'Jalapeño' chip, a custom-designed processor aimed at enhancing large language model inference capabilities. Set to run at scale by late 2026, this chip signifies OpenAI's first venture into custom hardware, marking a pivotal shift in its tech strategy. 🔍✨

What do you think about OpenAI's move into hardware? 

Sources: The Decoder, OpenAI

#OpenAI #Broadcom #AI #TechNews #MachineLearning #ChipDesign #Innovation #LLM #Semiconductors #Jalapeño #AIHardware #FutureTech

📷 Cover photo: 首相官邸ホームページ · CC BY 4.0

slides.headline: OPENAI JUST UNVEILED 'JALAPEÑO' — A CUSTOM CHIP FOR LLM INFERENCE
slides.sub: Here's what you need to know.
slides.image_prompt: A close-up of a futuristic semiconductor chip being held by engineers in a lab, showcasing intricate circuitry and a bright, modern workspace.

slides.headline: THE 'JALAPEÑO' CHIP WAS DESIGNED IN JUST NINE MONTHS
slides.sub: This marks the fastest ASIC development cycle OpenAI has achieved.
slides.image_prompt: An engineer analyzing a computer motherboard with advanced components, surrounded by high-tech lab equipment.

slides.headline: INITIAL TESTS SHOWED PERFORMANCE PER WATT THAT'S 'SUBSTANTIALLY BETTER'
slides.sub: These self-reported numbers are yet to be verified independently.
slides.image_prompt: A group of researchers discussing data in front of a large screen displaying machine learning graphs and models.

slides.headline: FIRST DEPLOYMENT IS PLANNED FOR LATE 2026 AT GIGAWATT SCALE
slides.sub: Broadcom and Microsoft are collaborating on this massive rollout.
slides.image_prompt: A high-tech manufacturing facility with large machines producing semiconductor wafers, illuminated by bright white lights.

slides.headline: OPENAI'S MOVE INTO HARDWARE COULD CHANGE AI MODEL DEPLOYMENTS
slides.sub: Follow @everydayhypehq for daily AI + Tech breakthroughs.
slides.image_prompt: A visionary shot of a city skyline at dusk with digital overlays of data and technology, symbolizing innovation and the future.

story.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil "Jalapeño," a custom chip built for LLM inference
